metadata.title: Seedance 1.5 API
metadata.description: Seedance 1.5 API をテストして統合し、テキスト・画像からの動画生成と任意の同期音声生成に対応します。

title: Seedance 1.5 API
description: Seedance 1.5 Pro は、SdanceAI の API ワークフローから利用できる ByteDance の動画生成モデルです。テキストから動画、画像から動画の生成に対応し、アスペクト比、尺、解像度、カメラ挙動、任意の音声生成を制御できます。
このページでプロンプト、参照画像、価格、リクエスト項目、タスク出力を検証してから、Seedance 1.5 を自社プロダクトや制作パイプラインへ組み込めます。
pricingNote: USD estimates use $0.005/credit with the best annual plan.

labels.apiDocsDetailDescription: Open the full API documentation for endpoints, authentication, task polling, and payload details.
labels.apiInputDescription: Keep the payload predictable while still allowing practical video controls.
labels.selectedModelNote: The playground, request sample, request fields, and pricing on this page follow the selected model type.

featuresTitle: What Seedance 1.5 API adds to your video workflow
featuresDescription: The page follows the same API-first structure as the reference: test the model, understand the fields, then move into integration.

capabilities.title: Text and image to video
capabilities.description: Generate videos from prompts alone, or add up to two image URLs to guide composition, subject identity, and scene style.

capabilities.title: Optional audio generation
capabilities.description: Enable generated audio when the clip needs synchronized atmosphere, effects, or voice-driven storytelling.

capabilities.title: Flexible output settings
capabilities.description: Control aspect ratio, resolution, duration, and camera locking so the API output fits product, ad, and social formats.

capabilities.title: Narrative-ready motion
capabilities.description: Use dynamic camera movement for cinematic scenes, or fixed lens mode when a stable product or character shot matters more.

quickStartTitle: From playground test to production request
quickStartDescription: A compact integration path for teams that want to validate Seedance 1.5 output before connecting the API to an app.

workflows.title: 1. Prepare request
workflows.description: Add a prompt, choose whether to include image URLs, then set aspect ratio, resolution, duration, and audio behavior.

workflows.title: 2. Submit generation
workflows.description: Call the API with your account key and the bytedance/seedance-1.5-pro model payload.

workflows.title: 3. Poll and render
workflows.description: Track the task until it succeeds, then retrieve the generated video URL for your app, campaign, or pipeline.

useCasesTitle: What you can create with Seedance 1.5 API
useCasesDescription: Use the API when your workflow needs repeatable short-form video output with practical controls.

communityShowcase.title: Successful Seedance 1.5 generations from the community
communityShowcase.description: Browse public Seedance 1.5 outputs that finished successfully, then open any case to inspect the prompt, settings, and result.

productionNotes.title: Account-gated execution
productionNotes.body: Users sign in, submit jobs, and consume credits through the existing SdanceAI generation flow.

productionNotes.title: Reference image handling
productionNotes.body: The API accepts uploaded or hosted image URLs for image-to-video workflows, with previews and payload editing in the studio.

productionNotes.title: Cost-aware settings
productionNotes.body: Resolution, duration, and audio options can be selected together to balance output quality, speed, and credit cost.

faqs.question: What is Seedance 1.5 API best for?
faqs.answer: It is best for short-form AI video generation where teams need prompt control, optional image guidance, and optional synchronized audio in a repeatable API workflow.

faqs.question: Does Seedance 1.5 API support image-to-video?
faqs.answer: Yes. The request can include image URLs for image-to-video generation, or omit them for text-to-video generation.

faqs.question: Can I generate audio with Seedance 1.5 API?
faqs.answer: Yes. The payload includes a generate_audio option. Enabling audio can increase generation cost, so review pricing before production use.

faqs.question: Which aspect ratios are supported?
faqs.answer: The current request schema supports common formats such as 1:1, 4:3, 3:4, 16:9, 9:16, and 21:9.

faqs.question: What duration and resolution options are available?
faqs.answer: The API supports short video durations with 480p, 720p, and 1080p resolution options. Pick them together based on your target channel and cost expectations.

faqs.question: What does fixed_lens do?
faqs.answer: fixed_lens locks the camera for more stable, static shots. Leave it disabled when you want Seedance to add dynamic camera movement.

faqs.question: Where can I test it before integrating?
faqs.answer: Use the playground on this page to test prompt, image URLs, aspect ratio, duration, resolution, audio, and API payload behavior before moving into production.

faqs.question: Can I use Seedance 1.5 API for commercial projects?
faqs.answer: This page is configured for production-style API workflows. For commercial use, review your account plan, credit balance, model availability, and applicable content policy requirements.

cta.title: Turn Seedance 1.5 into your video workflow
cta.description: Open the generator, test a prompt or image reference, then use the API docs when you are ready to integrate Seedance 1.5.
